players.availability_comment: No current adverse availability report found. Only 4 of 14 league fixtures are published here, so season-long estimate is conservative rather than fully schedule-backed.
players.availability_note: Available from IPL start, but only first-phase fixtures are officially published in provided context.
players.followup_reason: Need later-season team sheets or official preview to confirm batting slot and full-season availability estimate.
players.overseas_competition_comment: Competes on role balance, not overseas slots.
players.overseas_competition_note: Domestic player; overseas-player cap is not a constraint on selection.
players.playing_xi_comment: High-profile trade-in and frontline Indian wicketkeeper-batter; expected first-choice starter.

players.availability_comment: NZC/ICC reported shoulder rehab in March 2025; no March 2026 IPL-availability restriction found. Estimate reduced because only first 4 fixtures are officially published in provided context.
players.availability_note: No fresh unavailability found for IPL window, though prior shoulder rehabilitation in 2025 lowers certainty.
players.followup_reason: Need pre-match XI evidence and any New Zealand medical update closer to first CSK match.
players.overseas_competition_comment: Selection pressure from Noor Ahmad, Nathan Ellis, Jamie Overton, Akeal Hosein and other overseas options.
players.overseas_competition_note: Competes for one of four overseas slots in a squad with multiple overseas bowlers and all-rounders.
players.playing_xi_comment: Overseas seamer option, but competes with Ellis, Overton and spin-heavy overseas combinations.

players.availability_comment: Nothing recent found suggesting injury, suspension or late arrival. Full 14-match certainty is not supportable with only first-phase fixtures published.
players.availability_note: No adverse availability report found; estimate capped because only partial fixture list is published.
players.overseas_competition_comment: Role competition exists, but not via overseas quota.
players.overseas_competition_note: Domestic player; overseas-player cap is not the limiting factor.
players.playing_xi_comment: Core Indian middle-order all-round option and recurrent CSK first-choice pick.

players.availability_comment: No injury or absence report found in current search set. Only first-phase fixtures are officially published here.
players.availability_note: No current adverse availability report found; estimate remains conservative due to incomplete published fixtures.
players.followup_reason: Need matchday XIs to distinguish likely from guaranteed.
players.overseas_competition_comment: Competes with overseas seamers/all-rounders for cap-limited places, but role fit is favorable.
players.overseas_competition_note: Overseas slot competition exists, though his specialist spin role appears strong within squad construction.
players.playing_xi_comment: Premium overseas spinner and strong fit for Chepauk-type balance, but still subject to overseas-slot combinations.

players.availability_comment: No current injury or national-team conflict surfaced in search. Only first 4 league fixtures are formally available in input/official first-phase release.

players.playing_xi_comment: Overseas batting option, but not an obvious lock given wicketkeeping depth and other overseas bowling needs.

players.availability_comment: ECB reported broken finger in May 2025; no March 2026 IPL restriction found. Estimate remains conservative because published fixtures are incomplete.
players.availability_note: No current IPL-window unavailability found, but prior 2025 finger injury and limited direct 2026 availability reporting reduce certainty.
players.followup_reason: Need current fitness and role confirmation closer to season start.

players.overseas_competition_note: Competes for overseas slots with several bowling-heavy options.
players.playing_xi_comment: Overseas pace-bowling all-rounder option, but not a locked starter in all conditions.

players.availability_comment: Cricbuzz reported he was ruled out of IPL 2025 with elbow fracture; 2026 squad pages list him as captain, implying availability, but absence of explicit medical clearance lowers certainty. Published fixtures are also incomplete.
players.availability_note: Returned to 2026 squad listings after 2025 elbow-fracture setback, but direct official fitness clearance not located.
players.followup_reason: Need explicit 2026 fitness confirmation after 2025 elbow fracture.

players.availability_comment: Cricket Australia and ICC reported a hamstring injury in January-February 2026, though he was still around Australia's T20 World Cup campaign. No explicit full IPL clearance found; only first-phase fixtures are published here.
players.availability_note: Recent hamstring injury before T20 World Cup 2026 reduces certainty for full IPL availability.
players.followup_reason: Need explicit post-hamstring fitness clearance and first-match selection evidence.

players.playing_xi_comment: Overseas death-bowling option, but squad has multiple foreign bowling candidates and he enters after a recent hamstring issue.

content.text:
You are an IPL 2026 squad availability and lineup analyst.

Your job is only to assess non-stats fields for one IPL squad:
- playing_xi_tier
- availability_modifier
- availability_note
- overseas_competition_note
- research_confidence
- source URLs for each aspect
- whether this player still needs a player-level follow-up

Use web search. Prefer evidence in this order:
1. Official IPL / franchise / BCCI sources
2. Reputable cricket reporting
3. Other high-signal recent coverage only when better sources are unavailable

Rules:
- Do not invent facts.
- Be conservative. If evidence is weak or conflicting, lower research_confidence.
- Do not fetch batting/bowling stats; those are handled elsewhere.
- playing_xi_tier must be one of: GUARANTEED, LIKELY, ROTATION, UNLIKELY
- playing_xi_basis must be one of: confirmed_role, inferred_from_team_context, conflicting_reports, unknown
- availability_basis must be one of: confirmed_available, inferred_no_adverse_news, injury_report, late_joining, tournament_conflict, suspension, conflicting_reports, unknown
- overseas_competition_basis must be one of: overseas_slot_pressure, role_depth_competition, domestic_player, confirmed_role, conflicting_reports, unknown
- research_confidence must be one of: High, Medium, Low
- Use actual published IPL 2026 fixtures in the prompt when estimating availability.
- availability_expected_matches_available must be an integer from 0 to 14.
- availability_modifier must equal availability_expected_matches_available / 14, rounded reasonably.
- If published fixtures are incomplete, say so in availability_comment and lower research_confidence where that materially affects the answer.
- availability_modifier = 1.0 is allowed only with an explicit basis and comment.
- Every player must have at least one URL in each of:
  - playing_xi_source_urls
  - availability_source_urls
  - overseas_competition_source_urls
- For domestic players with no overseas-slot issue, overseas_competition_note should still explain that the overseas cap is not the constraint.
- Keep comments short, factual, and audit-friendly.
- Return JSON only.

Assess this IPL 2026 squad and return the structured JSON.
